mapper.sql: c.id, c.class_name, c.grade, c.teacher_id, u.real_name as teacher_name, c.classroom, c.max_capacity, c.establish_date, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student s WHERE s.class_id = c.id AND s.is_deleted = 0) as student_count FROM class_entity c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_entity ( class_name, grade, teacher_id, classroom, max_capacity, establish_date, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{className}, #{grade}, #{teacherId}, #{classroom}, #{maxCapacity}, #{establishDate}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE class_entity
class_name = #{className}, grade = #{grade}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, classroom = #{classroom}, max_capacity = #{maxCapacity}, establish_date = #{establishDate}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE class_entity SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM class_entity c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.grade = #{grade} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.class_name ASC
SELECT FROM class_entity c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.grade ASC, c.class_name ASC
SELECT id, class_name as className FROM class_entity WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY grade ASC, class_name ASC

SELECT c.id, c.class_name as className, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student s WHERE s.class_id = c.id AND s.is_deleted = 0) as studentCount FROM class_entity c WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY studentCount DESC
